“So the line from the Trump team is essentially that they were trying to collude with the Russian government to help their campaign, but the attempt was unsuccessful.” —Paul Waldman

01 Aug 2017

“What but some profound sense of inadequacy could explain the neediness and the nastiness, the pout and the pettiness, the vanity and the vulgarity, the anger and the aggression?” —Roger Cohen

01 Aug 2017

“And so, that unnerving silence in the face of an erratic executive branch is an abdication, and those in positions of leadership bear particular responsibility.” —Sen. Jeff Flake–R, AZ

01 Aug 2017

“the lesson that … conservatives appear to be teaching … is that power is more important than principle, … compromise is failure, and … that facts don’t matter.” —Brian C. Rosenberg

“Wealth, it turns out, leads to behavioral and psychological maladies. The rich act and think in misdirected ways.” —Charles Matthewes and Evan Sandsmark

“Trump is the essence of the GOP, distilled down to its depraved and odious core. … Have no doubt: There are more horrors to come.” —Paul Waldman

“Every vote cast for Donald Trump was a vote for vulgarity. His supporters got exactly what they paid for.” —Bret Stephens

Finally McCain’s actions match his rhetoric. “Senate Rejects Slimmed Down Obamacare Repeal as McCain Votes No”

27 Jul 2017

“But can we take a moment to consider the awfulness of Senator John McCain?” —Paul Krugman

27 Jul 2017

“It is a multitiered tower of political idiocy, a sublime monument to the moronic, a gaudy, gleaming, Ozymandian folly that leaves many of the president’s prior efforts in its shade.” —Ross Douthat

26 Jul 2017

In the end, McCain is reduced to merely an angry hypocrite. “[his] vote on Tuesday helped enable the broken process on health care that he came to the floor to decry” —WaPo

25 Jul 2017

Hey, Seattle. If you haven’t pick a mayoral candidate, please consider Jessyn Farrell, a brilliant transit/density wonk who can get things done. Just six days left to vote!

25 Jul 2017

It’s a beautiful night for a ballgame. Go Mariners.

23 Jul 2017

Our AG should be hanged for treason. “Sessions … has provided ‘misleading’ statements that are ‘contradicted by other evidence.’”

“And if there is something bad, Mueller will find it. … In no scenario does Trump’s presidency recover.” —Jennifer Rubin
